summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 18 warning, 15 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/extensions.mjs:88 — `setTimeout` handle never cleared when hook resolves before timeout; store handle and `clearTimeout` in `finally`
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1182 — No size cap on extension return values; risk of `E2BIG` and token inflation; add per-extension truncation
🟡 bin/lib/extensions.mjs:44 — `import()` executes module-level code before hook validation; document as accepted v1 constraint
🟡 bin/lib/extensions.mjs:88 — `setTimeout` timer in `Promise.race` is never cleared when the hook resolves first; add `clearTimeout` in a `.finally()` block to prevent dangling timers
🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:1436` — Replan dispatches bypass `mergePromptAppend`; scoped out by task title but inconsistent with spec language "called before each agent dispatch"
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:114` — No size cap on extension return values; unbounded string risks token inflation and `E2BIG`
🟡 `test/extension-system.test.mjs:242` — Integration tests reproduce append logic inline rather than exercising the actual `run.mjs` code path
🟡 `tasks/task-1/artifacts/test-output.txt:232` — Stale artifact from prior 3-file architecture; doesn't match current test file

🟡 test/extension-system.test.mjs:19 — No test for project-level extension precedence over global; `loadExtensions` uses a `seen` Set (extensions.mjs:22-39) to shadow global extensions by name — add a test with same-named extensions in both dirs

🟡 test/extension-system.test.mjs:1 — No integration test for `mergePromptAppend` wiring in run.mjs; the 4 call sites (run.mjs:372, 1099, 1179, 1244) are verified only by reading code — if someone deletes `if (buildAppend) brief += "\n" + buildAppend;`, no test fails

🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:368 — Shared mutable `registry` object passed to concurrent `runParallelReviews` calls; circuit-breaking one extension in one parallel review affects all others; untested concurrent mutation
🟡 bin/lib/extensions.mjs:87 — `setTimeout` handle never cleared when hook resolves before timeout; flagged as 🔵 in 4 prior review rounds, never fixed — promoting to 🟡 for persistent non-resolution
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:114` — No size cap on extension output; unbounded string risks `E2BIG` crash at `run.mjs:290` and token inflation; add per-extension truncation cap (e.g. 10,000 chars)
🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:1179` — Extension output reaches `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` agent with no audit trail; add debug-level logging of appended strings before dispatch
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:44` — `import()` executes module-level code before hook validation; supply-chain risk accepted per SPEC.md:109; document with inline comment
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:88` — `setTimeout` handle never cleared on early resolution; accumulates live timers; add `clearTimeout` in `.finally()`

🔴 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:10` — `VALID_HOOKS` lists `"verdictAppend"`, `"executeRun"`, `"artifactEmit"` — none are ever invoked in the codebase. Extensions exporting only these hooks will load silently but never be called. **Gold-plating.** Fix: reduce to `["promptAppend"]`.
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:85-90` — `setTimeout` in `Promise.race` loser branch is never cleared; dangling timers accumulate across long runs.
🟡 `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:75` — `callHook` exported as public API with 1 production caller. Borderline premature export.
